Sun Zhong еӯ«д»І
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Zhong (еӯ«д»І). Fought with Zhu Jun and Liu Bei at Wan, but was killed by Liu Bei. Sun Zhong is a fictional character. Sun Zhong was affiliated with Yellow Scarves. Sun Zhong lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
